decisions.title: Teach Fresh And Forked Delegation Separately
decisions.description: Delegation is not a single pattern. A fresh worker is good for narrow isolated work, while a forked worker inherits context and is better when prior decisions matter.
decisions.alternatives: Describing every subagent as a clean room is simpler, but it becomes misleading once inherited-context delegation appears.

zh.title: 把 fresh 和 fork 两种委托模式分开讲
zh.description: 委托并不是单一模式。fresh 适合窄任务隔离，fork 则适合需要继承既有上下文和决策的场景。

ja.title: fresh と fork の委任を分けて教える
ja.description: 委任は一つの型ではありません。fresh は狭い隔離作業向きで、fork は過去の判断を引き継ぐ必要がある場合に向いています。

decisions.title: Return A Summary Instead Of Full Child Transcript
decisions.description: The parent only needs the useful outcome of delegated work. Returning a concise summary keeps the parent context stable and avoids replaying the entire child conversation.
decisions.alternatives: Inlining the child transcript preserves detail, but it quickly pollutes the parent context window.

zh.title: 子任务返回摘要，而不是完整对话
zh.description: 父 agent 真正需要的是有用结果，而不是完整子对话。摘要返回可以控制上下文膨胀。

ja.title: 子ワーカーは全文ではなく要約を返す
ja.description: 親エージェントに必要なのは有用な結果であり、子会話の全文ではありません。要約返却でコンテキスト膨張を抑えます。
